+msgid "Key Parameter Descriptions:"
+msgstr "关键参数说明："
 
 msgid ""
-"It's highly recommended to specify `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0` if your "
-"inference server will only process image inputs since enabling video inputs "
-"consumes more memory reserved for long video embeddings."
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size 2` maps the model to two NPUs. Increase TP only after validating memory, communication, and throughput on your hardware.\n"
+"- `--enable-expert-parallel` enables expert parallelism for MoE layers. Do not mix MoE tensor parallelism and expert parallelism in the same MoE layer.\n"
+"- `--max-model-len` is the maximum input plus output length for a single request. By default, the model can support long context, but `128000` is a practical validation value for many image/video workloads.\n"
+"- `--max-num-seqs` is the maximum number of active requests scheduled by each DP group. Video requests consume more memory, so the video example uses a smaller value.\n"
+"- `--max-num-batched-tokens` is the maximum number of tokens processed in one scheduler step. A larger value can improve prefill efficiency but consumes more activation memory.\n"
+"- `--gpu-memory-utilization` controls how much HBM vLLM can use to calculate KV cache capacity. Increase it only after confirming the service is stable.\n"
+"- `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0` disables video inputs and saves memory for image-only serving.\n"
+"- `--allowed-local-media-path /media` allows requests to use local files such as `file:///media/test.mp4`.\n"
+"- `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` enables full decode ACLGraph replay to reduce dispatch overhead."
 msgstr ""
-"如果推理服务器仅处理图像输入，强烈建议指定 `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video "
-"0`，因为启用视频输入会消耗更多预留用于长视频嵌入的内存。"
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size 2` 将模型映射到两个 NPU 上。仅在验证硬件上的内存、通信和吞吐量后，再增加 TP 值。\n"
+"- `--enable-expert-parallel` 为 MoE 层启用专家并行。不要在同一个 MoE 层中混合使用 MoE 张量并行和专家并行。\n"
+"- `--max-model-len` 是单个请求的最大输入加输出长度。默认情况下，模型可以支持长上下文，但 `128000` 是许多图像/视频工作负载的实用验证值。\n"
+"- `--max-num-seqs` 是每个 DP 组调度的最大并发请求数。视频请求消耗更多内存，因此视频示例使用了较小的值。\n"
+"- `--max-num-batched-tokens` 是单个调度步骤中处理的最大 token 数。较大的值可以提高 prefill 效率，但会消耗更多激活内存。\n"
+"- `--gpu-memory-utilization` 控制 vLLM 可用于计算 KV 缓存容量的 HBM 比例。仅在确认服务稳定后再增加此值。\n"
+"- `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0` 禁用视频输入，为纯图像服务节省内存。\n"
+"- `--allowed-local-media-path /media` 允许请求使用本地文件，例如 `file:///media/test.mp4`。\n"
+"- `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` 启用完整解码 ACLGraph 重放，以减少调度开销。"
 
 msgid ""
-"You can set `--max-model-len` to preserve memory. By default the model's "
-"context length is 262K, but `--max-model-len 128000` is good for most "
-"scenarios."
+"Common Issues Tip: If you encounter issues, please refer to the [Public "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html) for "
+"troubleshooting."
 msgstr ""
-"可以设置 `--max-model-len` 来节省内存。默认情况下模型的上下文长度为 262K，但 `--max-model-len 128000` "
-"适用于大多数场景。"
+"常见问题提示：如果遇到问题，请参考[公共 "
+"FAQ](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/faqs.html) 进行故障排除。"

-msgstr "如果服务启动成功，您将看到如下所示的信息："
+msgid "Service Verification:"
+msgstr "服务验证："
+
+msgid "Expected Result:"
+msgstr "预期结果："
 
 msgid ""
-"Once your server is started, you can query the model with input prompts:"
-msgstr "服务器启动后，您可以使用输入提示词查询模型："
+"The service returns HTTP 200 OK with a JSON response containing the "
+"`choices` field."
+msgstr "服务返回 HTTP 200 OK，JSON 响应中包含 `choices` 字段。"
+
+msgid "## 6 Functional Verification"
+msgstr "## 6 功能验证"
+
+msgid ""
+"After the server is started, send a request to verify basic multimodal "
+"functionality."
+msgstr "服务器启动后，发送请求以验证基本的多模态功能。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Expected result: the HTTP status is 200 and the JSON response contains a "
+"`choices` field with generated text, for example text similar to `TONGYI "
+"Qwen`."
+msgstr ""
+"预期结果：HTTP 状态码为 200，JSON 响应中包含带有生成文本的 `choices` 字段，例如类似于 `TONGYI Qwen` 的文本。"

+msgid ""

+
+msgid "## 9 Performance Tuning"
+msgstr "## 9 性能调优"
+
+msgid "### 9.1 Recommended Configurations"
+msgstr "### 9.1 推荐配置"
+
+msgid ""
+"> **Note**: The following configurations are validated in specific test "
+"environments and are for reference only. The optimal configuration depends "
+"on hardware type, image resolution, video length, maximum input/output "
+"length, request concurrency, prefix cache hit rate, and prefill/decode "
+"ratio. Tune the parameters in Section 9.2 based on your actual workload."
+msgstr ""
+"> "
+"**注意**：以下配置在特定测试环境中验证，仅供参考。最佳配置取决于硬件类型、图像分辨率、视频长度、最大输入/输出长度、请求并发度、前缀缓存命中率以及预填充/解码比例。请根据实际工作负载调整第9.2节中的参数。"
+
+msgid "#### Table 1: Scenario Overview"
+msgstr "#### 表1：场景概览"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Scenario | Deployment Mode | *Total NPUs | Weight Version | Key "
+"Considerations |"
+msgstr "| 场景 | 部署模式 | *NPU总数 | 权重版本 | 关键考量 |"
 
 msgid ""
-"- Refer to [supported features](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md) to get the model's supported feature matrix.\n"
-"- Refer to [feature guide](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md) to get the feature's configuration."
+"| Image-only serving | Single-node online serving | 2 or more NPUs | BF16 | "
+"Disable video, tune context length, and keep enough KV cache for visual "
+"tokens. |"
+msgstr "| 纯图像服务 | 单节点在线服务 | 2个或更多NPU | BF16 | 禁用视频，调整上下文长度，并为视觉令牌保留足够的KV缓存。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Video serving | Single-node online serving | 2 or more NPUs | BF16 | Use "
+"local media paths, lower concurrency, and reduce video length or frame "
+"sampling if OOM occurs. |"
 msgstr ""
-"- 请参考[支持的功能](../../user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.md)获取模型支持的功能矩阵。\n"
-"- 请参考[特性指南](../../user_guide/feature_guide/index.md)获取功能的配置方法。"
+"| 视频服务 | 单节点在线服务 | 2个或更多NPU | BF16 | 使用本地媒体路径，降低并发度，若发生OOM则减少视频长度或帧采样。 |"
 
-msgid "## Environment Preparation"
-msgstr "## 环境准备"
+msgid ""
+"| Functional graph validation | Single-node PP | 2 NPUs | BF16 | Use shorter"
+" context and explicit capture sizes to validate full decode ACLGraph "
+"behavior. |"
+msgstr "| 功能图验证 | 单节点PP | 2个NPU | BF16 | 使用较短的上下文和显式捕获大小，以验证完整解码ACLGraph行为。 |"
 
-msgid "### Prepare Model Weights"
-msgstr "### 准备模型权重"
+msgid ""
+"> `*Total NPUs` indicates the total number of NPUs used across all nodes. 1 "
+"node = 1 Atlas 800 A3 server (64G × 16 NPUs)."
+msgstr "> `*NPU总数`表示所有节点使用的NPU总数。1个节点 = 1台Atlas 800 A3服务器（64G × 16 NPU）。"
 
-msgid "### Installation"
-msgstr "### 安装"
+msgid "#### Table 2: Detailed Node Configuration"
+msgstr "#### 表2：详细节点配置"
 
-msgid "## Deployment"
-msgstr "## 部署"
+msgid ""
+"| Scenario | Node Role | NPUs | TP | PP | Max Num Seqs | Max Model Len | Max"
+" Num Batched Tokens | Prefix Cache | Main Optimizations |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 场景 | 节点角色 | NPU数 | TP | PP | 最大序列数 | 最大模型长度 | 最大批处理令牌数 | 前缀缓存 | 主要优化 |"
 
-msgid "### Online Serving"
-msgstr "### 在线服务"
+msgid ""
+"> For complete startup commands and parameter descriptions, please refer to "
+"the deployment examples in [Chapter 5](#5-online-service-deployment)."
+msgstr "> 完整的启动命令和参数说明，请参考[第5章](#5-online-service-deployment)中的部署示例。"
 
-msgid "=== \"Image Inputs\""
-msgstr "=== \"图片输入\""
+msgid "### 9.2 Tuning Guidelines"
+msgstr "### 9.2 调优指南"
 
-msgid "=== \"Video Inputs\""
-msgstr "=== \"视频输入\""
+msgid "#### 9.2.1 General Tuning Reference"
+msgstr "#### 9.2.1 通用调优参考"
 
-msgid "### Offline Inference"
-msgstr "### 离线推理"
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to the [Public Performance Tuning "
+"Documentation](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)"
+" for tuning methods."
+msgstr ""
+"调优方法请参考[公共性能调优文档](../../developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.md)。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Please refer to the [Feature "
+"Guide](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md) for detailed "
+"feature descriptions."
+msgstr "详细功能描述请参考[功能指南](../../user_guide/support_matrix/feature_matrix.md)。"
+
+msgid "#### 9.2.2 Recommended tuning order"
+msgstr "#### 9.2.2 推荐调优顺序"
+
+msgid ""
+"1. Start from image-only serving. Add video only after the image path is stable.\n"
+"2. Choose the maximum context length with `--max-model-len`. Multimodal requests consume KV cache for both text tokens and visual tokens, so reduce image resolution, video length, request concurrency, or context length if OOM occurs.\n"
+"3. Tune multimodal limits. Use `--limit-mm-per-prompt.image` and `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video` to match your request shape.\n"
+"4. Tune `--max-num-batched-tokens`. Larger values usually improve prefill throughput but increase activation memory. Video-heavy workloads usually need conservative values.\n"
+"5. Tune `--max-num-seqs` according to service concurrency. Video requests are more memory intensive than image requests, so start with a smaller value.\n"
+"6. Tune `--gpu-memory-utilization`. Increase it to provide more KV cache, but leave headroom for runtime memory fluctuation and media preprocessing.\n"
+"7. Tune ACLGraph capture. `FULL_DECODE_ONLY` is recommended for decode. If you set `cudagraph_capture_sizes` manually, include common decode batch sizes."
+msgstr ""
+"1. 从纯图像服务开始。仅在图像路径稳定后，再添加视频。\n"
+"2. 使用`--max-model-len`选择最大上下文长度。多模态请求会同时消耗文本令牌和视觉令牌的KV缓存，因此如果发生OOM，请降低图像分辨率、视频长度、请求并发度或上下文长度。\n"
+"3. 调整多模态限制。使用`--limit-mm-per-prompt.image`和`--limit-mm-per-prompt.video`来匹配您的请求形状。\n"
+"4. 调整`--max-num-batched-tokens`。较大的值通常能提高预填充吞吐量，但会增加激活内存。视频密集型工作负载通常需要保守的值。\n"
+"5. 根据服务并发度调整`--max-num-seqs`。视频请求比图像请求更消耗内存，因此请从较小的值开始。\n"
+"6. 调整`--gpu-memory-utilization`。增加该值以提供更多KV缓存，但需为运行时内存波动和媒体预处理预留空间。\n"
+"7. 调整ACLGraph捕获。解码推荐使用`FULL_DECODE_ONLY`。如果手动设置`cudagraph_capture_sizes`，请包含常见的解码批次大小。"
+
+msgid "### 9.3 Model-Specific Optimizations"
+msgstr "### 9.3 模型特定优化"
+
+msgid "| Optimization | Enablement | Benefit | Notes |"
+msgstr "| 优化项 | 启用方式 | 收益 | 说明 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Multimodal prompt limits | `--limit-mm-per-prompt.image`, `--limit-mm-per-"
+"prompt.video` | Avoids reserving memory for unused media types. | Disable "
+"video for image-only serving. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 多模态提示限制 | `--limit-mm-per-prompt.image`, `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video` | "
+"避免为未使用的媒体类型预留内存。 | 纯图像服务时禁用视频。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Local media access | `--allowed-local-media-path /media` | Avoids slow "
+"network video downloads during serving. | Use `file:///media/...` in "
+"requests. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 本地媒体访问 | `--allowed-local-media-path /media` | 避免服务期间缓慢的网络视频下载。 | "
+"在请求中使用`file:///media/...`。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Full decode ACLGraph | `--compilation-config "
+"'{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` | Reduces operator dispatch "
+"overhead and stabilizes decode performance. | Recommended for decode-heavy "
+"serving. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 完整解码ACLGraph | `--compilation-config "
+"'{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` | 减少算子调度开销，稳定解码性能。 | "
+"推荐用于解码密集型服务。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Expert parallelism | `--enable-expert-parallel` | Improves MoE serving "
+"throughput. | Do not mix MoE tensor parallelism and expert parallelism in "
+"the same MoE layer. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 专家并行 | `--enable-expert-parallel` | 提升MoE服务吞吐量。 | "
+"请勿在同一MoE层中混合使用MoE张量并行和专家并行。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Prefix caching | `--enable-prefix-caching` | Improves repeated-prefix "
+"workloads. | Random prompts or unique media may not benefit. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 前缀缓存 | `--enable-prefix-caching` | 提升重复前缀工作负载的性能。 | 随机提示或唯一媒体可能无法受益。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Asynchronous scheduling | `--async-scheduling` | Can improve high-"
+"concurrency throughput. | Disable and compare for latency-sensitive "
+"workloads. |"
+msgstr "| 异步调度 | `--async-scheduling` | 可提升高并发吞吐量。 | 对于延迟敏感型工作负载，请禁用并进行对比。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| Pipeline parallel validation | `--pipeline-parallel-size 2` | Provides "
+"another two-card validation layout. | Use shorter context and lower batch "
+"tokens for functional tests. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| 流水线并行验证 | `--pipeline-parallel-size 2` | 提供另一种双卡验证布局。 | "
+"功能测试时使用较短的上下文和较低的批处理令牌数。 |"
+
+msgid "## 10 FAQ"
+msgstr "## 10 常见问题"
+
+msgid ""
+"For common environment, installation, and general parameter issues, refer to"
+" [Public FAQs](../../faqs.md). This section only covers model-specific "
+"issues for Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct."
+msgstr ""
+"常见环境、安装及通用参数问题，请参考[公共FAQ](../../faqs.md)。本节仅涵盖Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct的模型特定问题。"
+
+msgid "### Q1: Why does the service report OOM during startup?"
+msgstr "### Q1：为什么服务在启动时报告OOM？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** The service fails during profile run or exits before "
+"accepting requests."
+msgstr "**现象：** 服务在性能分析运行期间失败，或在接受请求之前退出。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** Long context, high image resolution, video inputs, large `--max-"
+"num-seqs`, large `--max-num-batched-tokens`, or high `--gpu-memory-"
+"utilization` can leave insufficient HBM headroom."
+msgstr ""
+"**原因：** 长上下文、高图像分辨率、视频输入、较大的 `--max-num-seqs`、较大的 `--max-num-batched-tokens`"
+" 或较高的 `--gpu-memory-utilization` 可能导致 HBM 预留空间不足。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Start with image-only serving, set `--limit-mm-per-"
+"prompt.video 0`, reduce `--max-model-len`, lower `--max-num-seqs`, lower "
+"`--max-num-batched-tokens`, or reduce `--gpu-memory-utilization`. Keep "
+"`PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True`."
+msgstr ""
+"**解决方案：** 从纯图像服务开始，设置 `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0`，减小 `--max-model-"
+"len`，降低 `--max-num-seqs`，降低 `--max-num-batched-tokens`，或降低 `--gpu-memory-"
+"utilization`。保持 `PYTORCH_NPU_ALLOC_CONF=expandable_segments:True`。"
+
+msgid "### Q2: Why is video disabled in the image-only command?"
+msgstr "### Q2：为什么在纯图像命令中禁用了视频？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** The service reserves more memory than expected even when "
+"requests only contain images."
+msgstr "**现象：** 即使请求仅包含图像，服务预留的内存也超出预期。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** Allowing video inputs can reserve memory for long visual "
+"embeddings and preprocessing paths."
+msgstr "**原因：** 允许视频输入可能会为长视觉嵌入和预处理路径预留内存。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Use `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0` for image-only serving. "
+"Enable video only when the workload needs it."
+msgstr "**解决方案：** 对于纯图像服务，使用 `--limit-mm-per-prompt.video 0`。仅在负载需要时启用视频。"
+
+msgid "### Q3: Why does the video request fail with a local file path?"
+msgstr "### Q3：为什么使用本地文件路径的视频请求会失败？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** The request reports that the file is not allowed or cannot "
+"be found."
+msgstr "**现象：** 请求报告文件不被允许或无法找到。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** The server can only access local media paths that are mounted "
+"into the container and allowed by `--allowed-local-media-path`."
+msgstr "**原因：** 服务器只能访问已挂载到容器中且由 `--allowed-local-media-path` 允许的本地媒体路径。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Mount the host media directory to `/media`, start the server "
+"with `--allowed-local-media-path /media`, and use a request URL like "
+"`file:///media/test.mp4`."
+msgstr ""
+"**解决方案：** 将主机媒体目录挂载到 `/media`，使用 `--allowed-local-media-path /media` "
+"启动服务器，并使用类似 `file:///media/test.mp4` 的请求 URL。"
+
+msgid "### Q4: Why does enabling prefix caching not improve performance?"
+msgstr "### Q4：为什么启用前缀缓存不能提升性能？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** Prefix caching is enabled, but throughput or latency does "
+"not improve."
+msgstr "**现象：** 已启用前缀缓存，但吞吐量或延迟没有改善。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** Prefix caching only helps when requests share reusable prefixes. "
+"Unique images, unique videos, or random prompts may add memory pressure "
+"without visible gains."
+msgstr "**原因：** 前缀缓存仅在请求共享可重用前缀时才有帮助。独特的图像、独特的视频或随机提示可能会增加内存压力，但无明显收益。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Enable prefix caching for repeated-prefix workloads. For "
+"random benchmarks or memory-constrained video workloads, compare with prefix"
+" caching disabled."
+msgstr "**解决方案：** 为重复前缀的工作负载启用前缀缓存。对于随机基准测试或内存受限的视频工作负载，请与禁用前缀缓存的情况进行比较。"
+
+msgid ""
+"### Q5: Why does multimodal accuracy evaluation fail to insert image tokens?"
+msgstr "### Q5：为什么多模态精度评估无法插入图像标记？"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Phenomenon:** Evaluation fails because image placeholders cannot be found "
+"in the prompt."
+msgstr "**现象：** 评估失败，因为提示中找不到图像占位符。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Cause:** Qwen3-VL multimodal tasks rely on the model chat template to "
+"insert image placeholder tokens before multimodal processing."
+msgstr "**原因：** Qwen3-VL 多模态任务依赖模型聊天模板在多模态处理前插入图像占位符标记。"
+
+msgid ""
+"**Solution:** Enable chat template application in the evaluation "
+"configuration. For lm_eval-based multimodal tasks, set `apply_chat_template`"
+" to true."
+msgstr ""
+"**解决方案：** 在评估配置中启用聊天模板应用。对于基于 lm_eval 的多模态任务，将 `apply_chat_template` 设置为 "
+"true。"

-"- `--max-num-seqs` is the maximum number of active requests scheduled by each DP group. For performance tests, set `--max-num-seqs * --data-parallel-size` greater than or equal to the test concurrency.\n"
-"- `--max-num-batched-tokens` is the maximum number of tokens processed in one scheduler step. A larger value can improve prefill efficiency but consumes more activation memory.\n"
-"- `--gpu-memory-utilization` controls how much HBM vLLM can use to calculate KV cache capacity. A higher value increases KV cache size but can trigger OOM if runtime memory is higher than the profile run.\n"
-"- `--enable-prefix-caching` enables prefix caching. For long-context serving, monitor memory usage because prefix caching can increase KV cache pressure.\n"
-"- `--quantization ascend` enables Ascend quantization for the W8A8 model. Remove this option when deploying the BF16 model.\n"
-"- `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` enables full decode ACLGraph replay to reduce dispatch overhead.\n"

-"- `--max-num-batched-tokens` 是单个调度步骤中处理的最大 token 数。较大的值可以提高预填充效率，但会消耗更多激活内存。\n"
-"- `--gpu-memory-utilization` 控制 vLLM 可用于计算 KV 缓存容量的 HBM 比例。较高的值会增加 KV 缓存大小，但如果运行时内存高于 profile 运行，则可能触发 OOM。\n"
-"- `--enable-prefix-caching` 启用前缀缓存。对于长上下文服务，请监控内存使用情况，因为前缀缓存可能会增加 KV 缓存压力。\n"
-"- `--quantization ascend` 为 W8A8 模型启用昇腾量化。部署 BF16 模型时请移除该选项。\n"
-"- `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` 启用完整解码 ACLGraph 重放以减少调度开销。\n"
-"- `--additional-config` 启用昇腾特定优化。`enable_flashcomm1` 启用 FlashComm1，`multistream_overlap_shared_expert` 重叠共享专家计算，`enable_cpu_binding` 启用昇腾原生 CPU 绑定。\n"

@@ -482,3 +427,107 @@ msgstr ""
 "| Qwen3.6 MTP推测解码 | `--speculative-config '{\"method\": \"qwen3_5_mtp\", "

+
+msgid ""
+"- `Qwen3.6-35B-A3B` (BF16 version): requires 1 Atlas A3 inference products (64G x 16) node, 1 Atlas A2 inference products (64G x 8) node, or Atlas inference products. [Download model weight](https://modelscope.cn/models/Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B).\n"
+"- `Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8` (quantized version): requires 1 Atlas A3 inference products (64G x 16) node, 1 Atlas A2 inference products (64G x 8) node, or Atlas inference products. [Download model weight](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8)."
+msgstr ""
+"- `Qwen3.6-35B-A3B`（BF16版本）：需要1个Atlas A3推理产品（64G x 16）节点、1个Atlas A2推理产品（64G x 8）节点或Atlas推理产品。[下载模型权重](https://modelscope.cn/models/Qwen/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B)。\n"
+"- `Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8`（量化版本）：需要1个Atlas A3推理产品（64G x 16）节点、1个Atlas A2推理产品（64G x 8）节点或Atlas推理产品。[下载模型权重](https://www.modelscope.cn/models/Eco-Tech/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8)。"
+
+msgid ""
+"Select an image based on your machine type. For example, use "
+"`quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ vllm_ascend_version }}` for Atlas A2 "
+"inference products, `quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ vllm_ascend_version "
+"}}-a3` for Atlas A3 inference products, and `quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ "
+"vllm_ascend_version }}-310p` for Atlas inference products."
+msgstr ""
+"根据您的机器类型选择镜像。例如，对于Atlas A2推理产品，使用`quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ "
+"vllm_ascend_version }}`；对于Atlas A3推理产品，使用`quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ "
+"vllm_ascend_version }}-a3`；对于Atlas推理产品，使用`quay.io/ascend/vllm-ascend:{{ "
+"vllm_ascend_version }}-310p`。"
+
+msgid "=== \"Atlas A3 inference products\""
+msgstr "=== \"Atlas A3推理产品\""
+
+msgid "=== \"Atlas A2 inference products\""
+msgstr "=== \"Atlas A2推理产品\""
+
+msgid "=== \"Atlas inference products\""
+msgstr "=== \"Atlas推理产品\""
+
+msgid "#### Standard container"
+msgstr "#### 标准容器"
+
+msgid ""
+"For Atlas inference products, source installation may pull in `triton` and "
+"`triton-ascend`. Uninstall them before running vLLM-Ascend on Atlas "
+"inference products:"
+msgstr ""
+"对于Atlas推理产品，源码安装可能会引入`triton`和`triton-ascend`。在Atlas推理产品上运行vLLM-"
+"Ascend之前，请卸载它们："
+
+msgid ""
+"Single-node deployment runs both Prefill and Decode on the same node. "
+"`Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8` can be deployed on 1 Atlas A3 inference products (64G"
+" x 16) or 1 Atlas A2 inference products (64G x 8), or Atlas inference "
+"products. The W8A8 version needs `--quantization ascend`."
+msgstr ""
+"单节点部署将Prefill和Decode运行在同一节点上。`Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-w8a8`可以部署在1个Atlas A3推理产品（64G x"
+" 16）、1个Atlas A2推理产品（64G x 8）或Atlas推理产品上。W8A8版本需要`--quantization ascend`。"
+
+msgid "=== \"Atlas A2 inference products / Atlas A3 inference products\""
+msgstr "=== \"Atlas A2推理产品 / Atlas A3推理产品\""
+
+msgid ""
+"Run the following script to execute online inference with up to 262144 "
+"context length on 1 Atlas A3 inference products (64G x 16)."
+msgstr "运行以下脚本，在1个Atlas A3推理产品（64G x 16）上执行上下文长度高达262144的在线推理。"
+
+msgid ""
+"- `--data-parallel-size 1` and `--tensor-parallel-size 2` set DP and TP for the default single-node serving example.\n"
+"    - `--enable-expert-parallel` enables expert parallelism for MoE layers. Do not mix MoE tensor parallelism and expert parallelism in the same MoE layer.\n"
+"    - `--max-model-len` is the maximum input plus output length for a single request. Increase it only when enough KV cache is available.\n"
+"    - `--max-num-seqs` is the maximum number of active requests scheduled by each DP group. For performance tests, set `--max-num-seqs * --data-parallel-size` greater than or equal to the test concurrency.\n"
+"    - `--max-num-batched-tokens` is the maximum number of tokens processed in one scheduler step. A larger value can improve prefill efficiency but consumes more activation memory.\n"
+"    - `--gpu-memory-utilization` controls how much HBM vLLM can use to calculate KV cache capacity. A higher value increases KV cache size but can trigger OOM if runtime memory is higher than the profile run.\n"
+"    - `--enable-prefix-caching` enables prefix caching. For long-context serving, monitor memory usage because prefix caching can increase KV cache pressure.\n"
+"    - `--quantization ascend` enables Ascend quantization for the W8A8 model. Remove this option when deploying the BF16 model.\n"
+"    - `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'` enables full decode ACLGraph replay to reduce dispatch overhead.\n"
+"    - `--additional-config` enables Ascend-specific optimizations. `enable_flashcomm1` enables FlashComm1, `multistream_overlap_shared_expert` overlaps shared expert computation, and `enable_cpu_binding` enables Ascend-native CPU binding.\n"
+"    - `--async-scheduling` enables asynchronous scheduling, which can improve high-concurrency throughput."
+msgstr ""
+"- `--data-parallel-size 1`和`--tensor-parallel-size 2`为默认的单节点服务示例设置DP和TP。\n"
+"    - `--enable-expert-parallel`为MoE层启用专家并行。不要在同一个MoE层中混合使用MoE张量并行和专家并行。\n"
+"    - `--max-model-len`是单个请求的最大输入加输出长度。仅在KV缓存充足时增加此值。\n"
+"    - `--max-num-seqs`是每个DP组调度的最大活跃请求数。对于性能测试，设置`--max-num-seqs * --data-parallel-size`大于或等于测试并发数。\n"
+"    - `--max-num-batched-tokens`是单个调度步骤中处理的最大token数。较大的值可以提高预填充效率，但会消耗更多激活内存。\n"
+"    - `--gpu-memory-utilization`控制vLLM可用于计算KV缓存容量的HBM比例。较高的值会增加KV缓存大小，但如果运行时内存高于profile运行，可能触发OOM。\n"
+"    - `--enable-prefix-caching`启用前缀缓存。对于长上下文服务，请监控内存使用情况，因为前缀缓存可能增加KV缓存压力。\n"
+"    - `--quantization ascend`为W8A8模型启用Ascend量化。部署BF16模型时请移除该选项。\n"
+"    - `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\":\"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\"}'`启用全解码ACLGraph重放以减少调度开销。\n"
+"    - `--additional-config`启用Ascend特定优化。`enable_flashcomm1`启用FlashComm1，`multistream_overlap_shared_expert`重叠共享专家计算，`enable_cpu_binding`启用Ascend原生CPU绑定。\n"
+"    - `--async-scheduling`启用异步调度，可以提高高并发吞吐量。"
+
+msgid ""
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size 2` maps the model across two Atlas inference devices. Adjust it together with `ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES` according to the available devices and memory.\n"
+"    - `--dtype float16` is used for Atlas inference products to match the Atlas inference execution path.\n"
+"    - `--max-model-len 16384` is intentionally conservative. On Atlas inference products, large context lengths allocate large attention masks, so do not rely on automatic max-model-len detection.\n"
+"    - `--max-num-seqs 16` limits concurrent active requests to reduce KV cache and graph capture pressure on Atlas inference products.\n"
+"    - `--gpu-memory-utilization` controls KV cache capacity. Reduce it if startup or runtime requests report OOM.\n"
+"    - `--additional-config '{\"ascend_compilation_config\": {\"fuse_norm_quant\": false}}'` disables norm-quant fusion for the Atlas inference products serving path.\n"
+"    - `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": \"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\", \"cudagraph_capture_sizes\": [1,2,4,8,16]}'` enables decode ACLGraph replay and explicitly limits capture sizes for Atlas inference products.\n"
+"    - `--no-enable-prefix-caching` is the default recommendation for this Atlas inference products example to reduce memory pressure.\n"
+"    - `--quantization ascend` enables Ascend quantization for the W8A8 model. Remove this option when deploying the BF16 model.\n"
+"    - To enable MTP speculative decoding, use --speculative_config '{\"method\": \"mtp\", \"num_speculative_tokens\": 1}'. We recommend setting num_speculative_tokens to 1."
+msgstr ""
+"- `--tensor-parallel-size 2`将模型映射到两个Atlas推理设备上。根据可用设备和内存，与`ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES`一起调整。\n"
+"    - `--dtype float16`用于Atlas推理产品，以匹配Atlas推理执行路径。\n"
+"    - `--max-model-len 16384`有意设置为保守值。在Atlas推理产品上，较大的上下文长度会分配较大的注意力掩码，因此不要依赖自动的max-model-len检测。\n"
+"    - `--max-num-seqs 16`限制并发活跃请求数，以减少Atlas推理产品上的KV缓存和图捕获压力。\n"
+"    - `--gpu-memory-utilization`控制KV缓存容量。如果启动或运行时请求报告OOM，请减小此值。\n"
+"    - `--additional-config '{\"ascend_compilation_config\": {\"fuse_norm_quant\": false}}'`为Atlas推理产品服务路径禁用norm-quant融合。\n"
+"    - `--compilation-config '{\"cudagraph_mode\": \"FULL_DECODE_ONLY\", \"cudagraph_capture_sizes\": [1,2,4,8,16]}'`启用解码ACLGraph重放，并显式限制Atlas推理产品的捕获大小。\n"
+"    - `--no-enable-prefix-caching`是此Atlas推理产品示例的默认建议，以减少内存压力。\n"
+"    - `--quantization ascend`为W8A8模型启用Ascend量化。部署BF16模型时请移除该选项。\n"
+"    - 要启用MTP推测解码，请使用--speculative_config '{\"method\": \"mtp\", \"num_speculative_tokens\": 1}'。我们建议将num_speculative_tokens设置为1。"

 "候选值/索引，而非执行全词汇量的 all-to-all/all-gather 操作。 |"
+

+msgid ""
+"The legacy top-level `enable_balance_scheduling`, "
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable`, `short_request_first_config`, and "
+"`profiling_chunk_config` keys remain supported during the migration period, "
+"but are deprecated. If both formats provide the same field, the value in "
+"`scheduler_config` takes precedence."
+msgstr ""
+"在迁移期间，旧版顶层键 "
+"`enable_balance_scheduling`、`recompute_scheduler_enable`、`short_request_first_config`"
+" 和 `profiling_chunk_config` 仍然受支持，但已弃用。如果两种格式提供了相同的字段，则以 `scheduler_config` "
+"中的值为准。"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `enable_balance_scheduling` | bool | `False` | Whether to enable balance "
+"scheduling. Can also be configured via the `VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` "
+"environment variable during the migration period. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `enable_balance_scheduling` | bool | `False` | 是否启用均衡调度。在迁移期间，也可以通过 "
+"`VLLM_ASCEND_BALANCE_SCHEDULING` 环境变量进行配置。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `recompute_scheduler_enable` | bool | `False` | Whether to enable the "
+"recompute scheduler. **Only valid on PD-disaggregated D nodes** (`kv_role` "
+"is `kv_consumer`). **Do not enable on P nodes or in PD-mixed mode** (no "
+"`kv_transfer_config`, `kv_role` is `kv_producer`, or `kv_role` is "
+"`kv_both`); startup will fail with a clear error. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `recompute_scheduler_enable` | bool | `False` | "
+"是否启用重计算调度器。**仅在PD分离的D节点上有效**（`kv_role` 为 "
+"`kv_consumer`）。**不要在P节点或PD混合模式下启用**（没有 `kv_transfer_config`，`kv_role` 为 "
+"`kv_producer`，或 `kv_role` 为 `kv_both`）；启动将失败并显示明确的错误信息。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `profiling_chunk_config` | dict | `{}` | Configuration options for dynamic"
+" chunked pipeline parallel. See [Dynamic Chunked Pipeline "
+"Parallel](../feature_guide/dynamic_chunk_pipeline_parallel.md) for details. "
+"|"
+msgstr ""
+"| `profiling_chunk_config` | dict | `{}` | "
+"动态分块流水线并行的配置选项。详情请参见[动态分块流水线并行](../feature_guide/dynamic_chunk_pipeline_parallel.md)。"
+" |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `short_request_first_config` | dict | `{}` | Configuration options for "
+"ShortRequestFirst prefill scheduling on the PD prefill (P) node. Used with "
+"`recompute_scheduler_enable=true`. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `short_request_first_config` | dict | `{}` | "
+"PD预填充（P）节点上ShortRequestFirst预填充调度的配置选项。与 `recompute_scheduler_enable=true` "
+"一起使用。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `batch_job_sched_config` | dict | `{}` | Configuration options for the "
+"batch-job-aware scheduler. See [Batch-Job-Aware "
+"Scheduler](../feature_guide/batch_job_aware_scheduler.md) for details. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `batch_job_sched_config` | dict | `{}` | "
+"批处理作业感知调度器的配置选项。详情请参见[批处理作业感知调度器](../feature_guide/batch_job_aware_scheduler.md)。"
+" |"
+
+msgid "**scheduler_config.profiling_chunk_config**"
+msgstr "**scheduler_config.profiling_chunk_config**"
+
+msgid "**scheduler_config.short_request_first_config**"
+msgstr "**scheduler_config.short_request_first_config**"
+
+msgid ""
+"ShortRequestFirst is a waiting-queue policy wired through the recompute "
+"scheduler. See [ShortRequestFirst Prefill "
+"Scheduling](../feature_guide/short_request_first.md) for usage, behavior, "
+"and tuning guidance."
+msgstr ""
+"ShortRequestFirst是一种通过重计算调度器实现的等待队列策略。有关用法、行为和调优指南，请参见[ShortRequestFirst预填充调度](../feature_guide/short_request_first.md)。"
+
+msgid "**scheduler_config.batch_job_sched_config**"
+msgstr "**scheduler_config.batch_job_sched_config**"
+
+msgid "| `enabled` | bool | `false` | Enable the batch-job-aware scheduler. |"
+msgstr "| `enabled` | bool | `false` | 启用批处理作业感知调度器。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `max_jobs` | int | `20` | Maximum number of tracked jobs. `0` means "
+"unlimited. |"
+msgstr "| `max_jobs` | int | `20` | 最大跟踪作业数。`0` 表示无限制。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `reserve_margin_blocks` | int | `2` | Extra block margin added to the KV "
+"cache reserve as safety buffer. |"
+msgstr "| `reserve_margin_blocks` | int | `2` | 添加到KV缓存预留中的额外块余量，作为安全缓冲区。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `reserve_max_blocks` | int | `8` | Maximum number of blocks that can be "
+"reserved. |"
+msgstr "| `reserve_max_blocks` | int | `8` | 可预留的最大块数。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `low_available_tokens_threshold` | int | `4096` | Threshold for "
+"prioritising long vs short decode jobs. When available tokens > threshold, "
+"long decode jobs are prioritised; when ≤ threshold, short decode jobs are "
+"prioritised. |"
+msgstr ""
+"| `low_available_tokens_threshold` | int | `4096` | "
+"用于优先处理长解码作业与短解码作业的阈值。当可用token数 > 阈值时，优先处理长解码作业；当 ≤ 阈值时，优先处理短解码作业。 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"| `short_decode_token_threshold` | int | `32` | Threshold for classifying a "
+"job as \"short decode\". |"
+msgstr "| `short_decode_token_threshold` | int | `32` | 将作业分类为“短解码”的阈值。 |"

@@ -361,3 +327,38 @@ msgid ""
 msgstr ""
 "有关设计背景和实现细节，请参见\n"
 "[#10820: 重计算CPU卸载连接器](https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/issues/10820)。"
+
+msgid ""
+"`scheduler_config.recompute_scheduler_enable` must also be enabled in `additional-config` on\n"
+"P/D-disaggregated Decode nodes:"
+msgstr ""
+"在P/D分离的解码节点上，`additional-"
+"config`中也必须启用`scheduler_config.recompute_scheduler_enable`："
+
+msgid ""
+"* This feature requires the vLLM V1 engine and the vLLM-Ascend recompute\n"
+"  scheduler.\n"
+"* The feature is only intended for Decode nodes in P/D disaggregation. It is not\n"
+"  supported in PD-mixed or normal non-P/D deployments.\n"
+"* Do not enable `scheduler_config.recompute_scheduler_enable` in PD-mixed deployments. Without\n"
+"  P/D-disaggregated Decode-side `RecomputeScheduler`, recompute CPU offload is\n"
+"  not active and vLLM follows the normal recompute path.\n"
+"* When running in Docker with a large per-rank offload budget, reserve enough\n"
+"  shared memory. For typical A3 deployments with 16 GiB per-card offload, use\n"
+"  `--shm-size=1024g`.\n"
+"* `enable_offload_prefix_caching` is experimental and disabled by default.\n"
+"* Current D2H and H2D transfers use basic torch copy operations. They are\n"
+"  correctness-oriented and not yet optimized for transfer throughput.\n"
+"* Qwen3.5 with async scheduling is not fully supported yet. Disable async\n"
+"  scheduling when using recompute CPU offload with Qwen3.5 models.\n"
+"* If CPU memory capacity is insufficient, the connector skips offload for that\n"
+"  request and the scheduler falls back to the original recompute behavior."
+msgstr ""
+"* 此功能需要vLLM V1引擎和vLLM-Ascend重计算调度器。\n"
+"* 该功能仅适用于P/D分离中的解码节点。在PD混合或普通非P/D部署中不受支持。\n"
+"* 不要在PD混合部署中启用`scheduler_config.recompute_scheduler_enable`。没有P/D分离的解码端`RecomputeScheduler`时，重计算CPU卸载不会激活，vLLM将遵循正常的重计算路径。\n"
+"* 在Docker中运行且每个rank的卸载预算较大时，请预留足够的共享内存。对于典型的A3部署（每卡16 GiB卸载），请使用`--shm-size=1024g`。\n"
+"* `enable_offload_prefix_caching`为实验性功能，默认关闭。\n"
+"* 当前的D2H和H2D传输使用基本的torch拷贝操作。它们以正确性为导向，尚未针对传输吞吐量进行优化。\n"
+"* Qwen3.5与异步调度尚未完全支持。在使用Qwen3.5模型进行重计算CPU卸载时，请禁用异步调度。\n"
+"* 如果CPU内存容量不足，连接器将跳过该请求的卸载，调度器将回退到原始的重计算行为。"

 msgid "| `dflash` | Block diffusion-based parallel draft model |"
 msgstr "| `dflash` | 基于块扩散的并行草稿模型 |"
+
+msgid ""
+"- **`method`** (str, required): The speculative decoding method. Must be one of the supported method names listed in the table above.\n"
+"- **`num_speculative_tokens`** (int, required): Number of speculative tokens to generate per forward pass. Auto-filled from the draft model's `n_predict` config (e.g., MTP) or `suffix_decoding_max_tree_depth` (suffix method) when available.\n"
+"    > **Note**: For PD Separation deployment, `num_speculative_tokens` should be subject to one of the following conditions:\n"
+"    >\n"
+"    > 1. Hybrid Mamba models (e.g., Qwen-Next and Qwen3.5 series): `num_speculative_tokens` should be equal on P nodes and D nodes.\n"
+"    > 2. Other models: `num_speculative_tokens` on P nodes should be 1, and `num_speculative_tokens` on D nodes should be greater or equal to 1.\n"
+"- **`model`** (str, optional): Path or HF repo ID for the draft model. Required for `eagle`, `eagle3`, `dflash`, `medusa`, and `draft_model`. Automatically resolved for `mtp` (reuses target model), `ngram`, `suffix`, and `extract_hidden_states`.\n"
+"- **`draft_tensor_parallel_size`** (int, optional): Tensor parallelism size for the draft model. Can only be `1` or the same as the target model's tensor parallel size.\n"
+"- **`disable_padded_drafter_batch`** (bool, default: `False`): Disable input padding for speculative decoding. If set to `True`, speculative input batches can contain sequences of different lengths, which may only be supported by certain attention backends. **Note:** Only effective with `eagle`, `eagle3`, `mtp`, `dflash`, `draft_model`, and `extract_hidden_states` methods."
+msgstr ""
+"- **`method`** (str, 必填): 推测解码方法。必须是上表中列出的受支持方法名称之一。\n"
+"- **`num_speculative_tokens`** (int, 必填): 每次前向传播生成的推测令牌数量。当可用时，从草稿模型的 `n_predict` 配置（例如 MTP）或 `suffix_decoding_max_tree_depth`（后缀方法）自动填充。\n"
+"    > **注意**: 对于 PD 分离部署，`num_speculative_tokens` 应满足以下条件之一：\n"
+"    >\n"
+"    > 1. 混合 Mamba 模型（例如 Qwen-Next 和 Qwen3.5 系列）：`num_speculative_tokens` 在 P 节点和 D 节点上应相等。\n"
+"    > 2. 其他模型：P 节点上的 `num_speculative_tokens` 应为 1，D 节点上的 `num_speculative_tokens` 应大于或等于 1。\n"
+"- **`model`** (str, 可选): 草稿模型的路径或 HF 仓库 ID。对于 `eagle`、`eagle3`、`dflash`、`medusa` 和 `draft_model` 是必需的。对于 `mtp`（重用目标模型）、`ngram`、`suffix` 和 `extract_hidden_states` 会自动解析。\n"
+"- **`draft_tensor_parallel_size`** (int, 可选): 草稿模型的张量并行大小。只能是 `1` 或与目标模型的张量并行大小相同。\n"
+"- **`disable_padded_drafter_batch`** (bool, 默认值: `False`): 禁用推测解码的输入填充。如果设置为 `True`，推测输入批次可以包含不同长度的序列，这可能仅受某些注意力后端支持。**注意:** 仅对 `eagle`、`eagle3`、`mtp`、`dflash`、`draft_model` 和 `extract_hidden_states` 方法有效。"

commits.message:
[Doc][Misc] Fix Chinese release notes link (#12341)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

Fixes the translated Chinese release notes link for PR #7390 by
restoring the missing `https://` URL scheme. Without the scheme, the
generated documentation treats the target as a relative link and sends
readers to an invalid page.

### Relevant documentation

- [v0.18.0 release notes
(Chinese)](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/zh-cn/latest/user_guide/release_notes.html#v0180-20260430)

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This is a documentation-only correction.

### How was this patch tested?

- `msgfmt --check -o /dev/null
docs/source/locale/zh_CN/LC_MESSAGES/user_guide/release_notes.po`
- Compared Markdown link targets in each translated `msgstr` against its
source `msgid`; no mismatches remain.
- Generated the translated release notes and confirmed PR #7390 resolves
to `https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/pull/7390`.
- `uv run --offline --with-requirements requirements-lint.txt bash
format.sh ci`

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: zhuyixiang <zhuyixiang2014@163.com>

files.patch:

commits.message:
[BugFix][Doc] Preserve Chinese Markdown structure during translation (#12331)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

The Chinese documentation generator restored protected Markdown spans by
zipping spans extracted from the English source and translated text.
When translation changed line wrapping around a multi-backtick code
span, the span lists no longer aligned. Subsequent list markers, prose,
and inline code were then combined or duplicated in the generated
Markdown.

This PR:

- recognizes Markdown code spans delimited by arbitrary backtick-run
lengths;
- selects the longest non-overlapping translations from the original
source and applies them once, preventing shorter entries from
reprocessing translated content;
- keeps inline code, URLs, and link targets protected from short
translations; and
- adds regression coverage for multi-backtick spans, reordered inline
code, and protected short matches.

### Relevant documentation

- [For authors: adding
blocks](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/zh-cn/latest/developer_guide/contribution/doc_writing.html#_3)
- [`external_dp_proxy`
block](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/zh-cn/latest/developer_guide/contribution/doc_writing.html#converter_tag-external_dp_proxy)
- [For developers: adding a
converter](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/zh-cn/latest/developer_guide/contribution/doc_writing.html#_7)

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This is a documentation generation fix. Chinese documentation now
preserves the list and inline-code structure already represented
correctly in the PO translations.

### How was this patch tested?

- `uv run --offline --with-requirements docs/requirements-docs.txt
--with pytest pytest -q --confcutdir=tests/ut/_tools
tests/ut/_tools/test_generate_zh_docs.py`
- `uv run --offline --with-requirements requirements-lint.txt bash
format.sh ci`
- `DOCS_LANG=zh SITE_DIR=/private/tmp/vllm-ascend-zh-doc-site uv run
--offline --with-requirements docs/requirements-docs.txt bash
tools/rtd_build.sh`
- Browser verification of
`developer_guide/contribution/doc_writing.html`: the affected section
renders two ordered lists with 5 and 8 items, `YamlLoader` appears once,
and the browser console reports no errors.

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

---------

Signed-off-by: zhuyixiang <zhuyixiang2014@163.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+from tools.generate_zh_docs import apply_translations
+
+
+def test_preserves_translated_list_structure_with_multi_backtick_code():
+    source = """The current pipeline is:
+
+1. `BlockScanner` parses ``model-code`` fences and accepts only options listed
+   in `MODEL_CODE_OPTION_NAMES`.
+2. `YamlLoader` loads `test_case_path`.
+"""
+    translations = {
+        "The current pipeline is:": "当前的流程如下：",
+        (
+            "1. `BlockScanner` parses ``model-code`` fences and accepts only options listed\n"
+            "   in `MODEL_CODE_OPTION_NAMES`.\n"
+            "2. `YamlLoader` loads `test_case_path`."
+        ): (
+            "1. `BlockScanner` 解析 ``model-code`` 围栏，仅接受 `MODEL_CODE_OPTION_NAMES` 中列出的选项。\n"
+            "2. `YamlLoader` 加载 `test_case_path`。"
+        ),
+    }
+
+    result = apply_translations(source, translations)
+
+    assert (
+        result
+        == """当前的流程如下：
+
+1. `BlockScanner` 解析 ``model-code`` 围栏，仅接受 `MODEL_CODE_OPTION_NAMES` 中列出的选项。
+2. `YamlLoader` 加载 `test_case_path`。
+"""
+    )
+
+
+def test_preserves_code_order_from_translated_paragraph():
+    source = "`get_converter()` looks up `block.converter_tag` from `build_default_converters()`."
+    translation = "`get_converter()` 从 `build_default_converters()` 中查找 `block.converter_tag`。"
+
+    assert apply_translations(source, {source: translation}) == translation
+
+
+def test_short_translations_do_not_modify_protected_spans():
+    source = "Use mode with `mode`, [mode](https://example.com/mode), and ``mode``."
+
+    result = apply_translations(source, {"mode": "模式"})
+
+    assert result == "Use 模式 with `mode`, [模式](https://example.com/mode), and ``mode``."
+
+
+def test_matches_translated_prose_after_source_line_reflow():
+    source = "Phase 3 removes the direct environment-variable read. Details in [Phased rollout](#phased-rollout)."
+    msgid = "Phase 3 removes the direct environment-variable read. Details in\n[Phased rollout](#phased-rollout)."
+    translation = "阶段 3 移除了直接环境变量读取。详情请参见[分阶段推出](#phased-rollout)。"
+
+    assert apply_translations(source, {msgid: translation}) == translation

 URL_RE = re.compile(r"https?://\S+")
 LINK_TARGET_RE = re.compile(r"\]\(([^)\s]+)(?:\s+\"[^\"]*\")?\)")

-# Combined pattern that matches everything that should be protected from

-PROTECTED_RE = re.compile(rf"{INLINE_CODE_RE.pattern}|{URL_RE.pattern}|{LINK_TARGET_RE.pattern}")
+WHITESPACE_RE = re.compile(r"[ \t\n]+")
+MARKDOWN_BLOCK_PREFIX_RE = re.compile(r"(?:[-+*>#|]|\d+[.)])(?:\s|$)")
 
 
 def parse_po_file(po_path: Path) -> dict:
@@ -90,35 +87,156 @@ def _split_by_code_blocks(content: str) -> list:
     return segments
 
 
-def _protect_spans(text: str) -> list:
-    """Split a text segment into parts, protecting inline code, URLs,
-    and markdown link targets.
+def _inline_code_ranges(text: str) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:
+    """Return Markdown code-span ranges, including multi-backtick spans."""
+    ranges = []
+    pos = 0
+
+    while True:
+        start = text.find("`", pos)
+        if start == -1:
+            break
+
+        opener_end = start + 1
+        while opener_end < len(text) and text[opener_end] == "`":
+            opener_end += 1
+        delimiter = text[start:opener_end]
+        search_from = opener_end
+
+        while True:
+            close = text.find(delimiter, search_from)
+            if close == -1:
+                pos = opener_end
+                break
+
+            close_end = close + len(delimiter)
+            exact_run = (close == 0 or text[close - 1] != "`") and (close_end == len(text) or text[close_end] != "`")
+            if exact_run:
+                ranges.append((start, close_end))
+                pos = close_end
+                break
+            search_from = close + 1
+
+    return ranges
+
+
+def _protected_ranges(text: str) -> list[tuple[int, int]]:
+    """Return merged ranges for inline code, URLs, and link targets."""
+    ranges = _inline_code_ranges(text)
+    ranges.extend(match.span() for match in URL_RE.finditer(text))
+    ranges.extend(match.span() for match in LINK_TARGET_RE.finditer(text))
+    ranges.sort()
+
+    merged = []
+    for start, end in ranges:
+        if merged and start <= merged[-1][1]:
+            merged[-1] = (merged[-1][0], max(merged[-1][1], end))
+        else:
+            merged.append((start, end))
+    return merged
+
+
+def _is_reflow_safe(msgid: str) -> bool:
+    """Return whether a multiline msgid is a reflowed prose paragraph.
 
-    Returns a list of (text_part, is_protected) tuples.
+    Markdown block markers on continuation lines make line breaks semantic, so
+    those entries must keep using exact matching.
     """
+    lines = msgid.splitlines()
+    return len(lines) > 1 and all(not MARKDOWN_BLOCK_PREFIX_RE.match(line.lstrip()) for line in lines[1:])
+
+
+def _reflowed_msgid_pattern(msgid: str) -> re.Pattern:
+    """Build a pattern that tolerates single prose line-wrap differences."""
     parts = []
-    last_end = 0
+    cursor = 0
+    for whitespace in WHITESPACE_RE.finditer(msgid):
+        parts.append(re.escape(msgid[cursor : whitespace.start()]))
+        value = whitespace.group()
+        if value.count("\n") <= 1:
+            # Match either spaces on one line or one wrapped line. Never cross
+            # a blank line, which would join separate Markdown blocks.
+            parts.append(r"(?:[ \t]+|[ \t]*\n[ \t]*)")
+        else:
+            parts.append(re.escape(value))
+        cursor = whitespace.end()
+    parts.append(re.escape(msgid[cursor:]))
+    return re.compile("".join(parts))
+
 
-    for match in PROTECTED_RE.finditer(text):
-        if match.start() > last_end:
-            parts.append((text[last_end : match.start()], False))
-        parts.append((match.group(), True))
-        last_end = match.end()
+def _apply_segment_translations(text: str, translations: list[tuple[str, str]]) -> str:
+    """Apply the longest non-overlapping translations to the source once.
+
+    Matches contained entirely in code spans, URLs, or link targets are
+    ignored. Replacements are selected from the original text, so translated
+    content cannot be processed again by a shorter msgid.
+    """
+    protected = _protected_ranges(text)
+    candidates = []
 
-    if last_end < len(text):
-        parts.append((text[last_end:], False))
+    for msgid, msgstr in translations:
+        if not msgid.strip() or not msgstr.strip():
+            continue
+        matches = []
+        search_from = 0
+        while True:
+            start = text.find(msgid, search_from)
+            if start == -1:
+                break
+            end = start + len(msgid)
+            matches.append((start, end))
+            search_from = end
+
+        # PO entries can retain an older prose line wrapping even when the
+        # English paragraph is unchanged. Fall back to a whitespace-tolerant
+        # match for prose only; list, quote, table, and heading boundaries keep
+        # exact matching because their newlines are structural Markdown.
+        if not matches and _is_reflow_safe(msgid):
+            matches.extend(match.span() for match in _reflowed_msgid_pattern(msgid).finditer(text))
+
+        for start, end in matches:
+            fully_protected = any(start >= range_start and end <= range_end for range_start, range_end in protected)
+            if not fully_protected:
+                candidates.append((start, end, msgstr))
+
+    # Prefer complete paragraphs over shorter msgids contained within them.
+    candidates.sort(key=lambda item: (-(item[1] - item[0]), item[0]))
+    selected = []
+    selected_starts = []
+    for candidate in candidates:
+        start, end, _msgstr = candidate
+        low = 0
+        high = len(selected_starts)
+        while low < high:
+            middle = (low + high) // 2
+            if selected_starts[middle] < start:
+                low = middle + 1
+            else:
+                high = middle
+        index = low
+        overlaps_previous = index > 0 and selected[index - 1][1] > start
+        overlaps_next = index < len(selected) and selected[index][0] < end
+        if overlaps_previous or overlaps_next:
+            continue
+        selected.insert(index, candidate)
+        selected_starts.insert(index, start)
 
-    return parts
+    result = []
+    cursor = 0
+    for start, end, msgstr in selected:
+        result.append(text[cursor:start])
+        result.append(msgstr)
+        cursor = end
+    result.append(text[cursor:])
+    return "".join(result)
 
 
 def apply_translations(content: str, translations: dict) -> str:
     """Apply translations to markdown content.
 
-    Translations are first applied to the full prose text (outside fenced
-    code blocks) so that msgids containing link syntax (e.g. "[text](url)")
-    are matched correctly.  Afterwards, inline code, URLs, and link targets
-    are restored from the original text to prevent short-msgid replacements
-    (e.g. "mode" → "模式") from leaking into URLs or code.
+    Replacements are applied once to prose outside fenced code blocks. Longer
+    msgids take precedence, while inline code, URLs, and link targets remain
+    protected from shorter translations.
     """
     if not translations:
         return content

[Doc][Misc] Fix documentation navigation and formatting issues (#12334)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR groups four small documentation corrections found while
reviewing the current site:

- turns the Performance and Debug landing page into a useful directory
linking to its four guides;
- restores the missing title on the CPU frequency governor subsection;
- removes two obsolete Sphinx-style anchor lines that were visible as
unnecessary section content after the MkDocs migration;
- corrects the GLM-5.2 model link label in the supported-models table.

These changes improve navigation and remove confusing or incomplete
content without changing runtime behavior.

### Relevant documentation

- [Performance and Debug landing
page](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/index.html)
- [CPU frequency governor
section](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/optimization_and_tuning.html#41-set-cpu-frequency-governor-to-performance)
- [Service profiler configuration
appendix](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.html#61-profiling-configuration-file)
- [Service profiler symbols
appendix](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/developer_guide/performance_and_debug/service_profiling_guide.html#62-symbols-configuration-file)
- [Core supported
models](https://docs.vllm.ai/projects/ascend/en/latest/user_guide/support_matrix/supported_models.html#core-supported-models)

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

Documentation-only change. Readers see corrected navigation, headings,
and link text.

### How was this patch tested?

- `DOCS_LANG=en SITE_DIR=/private/tmp/vllm-ascend-doc-fixes-site uv run
--offline --with-requirements docs/requirements-docs.txt bash
tools/rtd_build.sh`
- `uv run --offline --with-requirements requirements-lint.txt bash
format.sh ci`
- Browser verification of the generated site confirmed:
- all four Performance and Debug directory links resolve to the expected
pages;
- the `4.1 Set CPU Frequency Governor to performance` heading renders
correctly;
- the two profiling appendix headings render without stray Sphinx anchor
text;
- the supported-models table displays `GLM-5.2` and links to
`GLM5.2.html`;
  - no browser console errors were reported.

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

---------

Signed-off-by: zhuyixiang <zhuyixiang2014@163.com>

[CI][Misc] Set up Node before installing OpenCode (#12348)

## What this PR does / why we need it?

The Main2Main job failed in `Install opencode + main2main-flow` with:

```text
npm: command not found
```

This follow-up:

- installs Node.js 24 for ARM64 with `actions/setup-node@v6`;
- downloads Node.js from Huawei Cloud's domestic Node mirror;
- configures npm to use Huawei Cloud's domestic npm registry;
- retains the existing `npm install -g opencode-ai` installation path.

Failed job:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend/actions/runs/29646428422/job/88085360082

## Does this PR introduce any user-facing change?

No. This only fixes OpenCode installation in the Main2Main CI workflow.

## How was this patch tested?

- Workflow YAML parsing passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

[CI] Refactor main2main workflow to use unchanged branch (#12346)

### What this PR does / why we need it?
Refactor main2main workflow to use unchanged branch

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

### How was this patch tested?

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: wjunLu <wjunlu217@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -256,8 +256,18 @@ jobs:
           BRANCH="main2main_auto_$(date +%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M)"
           git remote add upstream "https://github.com/${UPSTREAM_REPO}.git" || \
             git remote set-url upstream "https://github.com/${UPSTREAM_REPO}.git"
-          git fetch upstream main
-          git checkout -B "${BRANCH}" upstream/main
+          # Prefer main2main_baseline ref on the fork - it carries the
+          # cumulative successful adaptations from prior runs, enabling
+          # incremental adaptation.  Fall back to upstream/main if absent
+          # (first run, ref deleted, or fork reset).
+          if git fetch origin refs/heads/main2main_baseline:refs/remotes/origin/main2main_baseline 2>/dev/null; then
+            git checkout -B "${BRANCH}" origin/main2main_baseline
+            echo "::notice::incremental mode: starting from main2main_baseline"
+          else
+            git fetch upstream main
+            git checkout -B "${BRANCH}" upstream/main
+            echo "::notice::fresh mode: starting from upstream/main (no main2main_baseline found)"
+          fi
           BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
           echo "name=${BRANCH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
           echo "base_sha=${BASE_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

commits.message:
[CI][Misc] Use domestic Go proxy and local pre-commit cache (#12340)

## What this PR does / why we need it?

- Configure `GOPROXY` to use Huawei Cloud's domestic Go module proxy for
golang-based pre-commit hooks such as actionlint.
- Configure `GONOSUMDB` for the domestic proxy.
- Set `PRE_COMMIT_HOME` to `/tmp/main2main-pre-commit` for the main2main
runner and retain the existing `/tmp/pre-commit-cache` configuration for
the regular PR pre-commit job.

The failed Main2Main run showed `actionlint`'s `golangenv` timing out
against `https://proxy.golang.org`. The runner's `/root/.cache` is also
NFS-backed and does not provide reliable lock semantics.

## Does this PR introduce any user-facing change?

No. This only changes CI dependency sources and temporary cache
placement.

## How was this patch tested?

- YAML parsing passed for both modified workflows.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Failure diagnosis confirmed from job 88065519608 logs.

Note: `main2main_flow` currently hardcodes its own `PRE_COMMIT_HOME`;
its corresponding fix is prepared separately as commit `f1ae25b` in
`vllm-ascend/main2main_flow` and must be merged for the main2main cache
setting to take effect.
- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: lichaoran <pkwarcraft@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -166,6 +166,9 @@ jobs:
           FORCE_COLOR: "1"
           TERM: xterm-256color
           SHELLCHECK_OPTS: "--exclude=SC2046,SC2006,SC2086"
+          # Keep golang-based pre-commit hooks on a domestic module proxy.
+          GOPROXY: https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/goproxy/
+          GONOSUMDB: '*'
         run: |
           git config --global --add safe.directory /__w/vllm-ascend/vllm-ascend
           pre-commit run --all-files --hook-stage manual --show-diff-on-failure

@@ -62,6 +62,11 @@ jobs:
         UV_HTTP_TIMEOUT: 120
         UV_NO_CACHE: 1
         UV_SYSTEM_PYTHON: 1
+        PRE_COMMIT_HOME: /tmp/main2main-pre-commit
+        # Use Huawei Cloud's domestic Go module proxy for pre-commit hooks
+        # such as actionlint, whose golangenv otherwise accesses proxy.golang.org.
+        GOPROXY: https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/goproxy/
+        GONOSUMDB: '*'
     defaults:
       run:
         shell: bash -el {0}

commits.message:
[Refactor] Remove flashcomm2 optimization techniques (#12117)

## What this PR does / why we need it?

Remove the VLLM_ASCEND_FLASHCOMM2_PARALLEL_SIZE configuration and the
FlashComm2 optimization path. This deletes the config/env migration
entry, validation helpers, FlashComm2 process groups, row-parallel
linear dispatch path, quantization adapter branch, related tests, and
additional_config documentation.

## Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This removes a deprecated/internal FlashComm2 optimization
configuration path.

## How was this patch tested?

- git diff --check
- python -m py_compile vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py
vllm_ascend/ascend_forward_context.py
vllm_ascend/distributed/parallel_state.py vllm_ascend/envs.py
vllm_ascend/ops/linear_op.py vllm_ascend/platform.py
vllm_ascend/quantization/method_adapters.py
vllm_ascend/quantization/methods/w8a8_static.py vllm_ascend/utils.py
tests/ut/distributed/test_parallel_state.py tests/ut/ops/test_linear.py
tests/ut/ops/test_prepare_finalize.py
tests/ut/quantization/conftest_quantization.py
tests/ut/spec_decode/a2/test_eagle_proposer.py
tests/ut/spec_decode/test_speculators_vwn_eagle3.py
tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py tests/ut/test_platform.py
- git grep -n
"VLLM_ASCEND_FLASHCOMM2_PARALLEL_SIZE\\|enable_flashcomm2_parallel_size\\|flashcomm2_oproj_tensor_parallel_size\\|flashcomm2_enable\\|get_flashcomm2\\|Flashcomm2OProjRowParallelOp"
-- .

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

---------

Signed-off-by: ningjingbengxiaohai <hanjemail@126.com>

commits.message:
[CI][Misc] Use domestic npm mirror for OpenCode installation (#12330)

## What this PR does / why we need it?

- Install `opencode-ai` through Huawei Cloud's domestic npm mirror in
the `main2main` workflow.
- Keep the existing `$HOME/.opencode/bin` installation path and PATH
usage.
- Avoid the official installer path that queries the GitHub API and
downloads the release from GitHub, which is slow from Huawei Cloud
runners in mainland China.

## Does this PR introduce any user-facing change?

No. This only changes the CI installation source for OpenCode.

## How was this patch tested?

- YAML parsing passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- The workflow installation itself requires the GitHub Actions Huawei
Cloud runner.
- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: lichaoran <pkwarcraft@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -171,8 +171,13 @@ jobs:
           set -eu
           set -o pipefail
 
-          # install opencode (curl --retry handles transient SSL drops)
-          curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 5 --retry-all-errors https://opencode.ai/install | bash
+          # Install through Huawei Cloud's domestic npm mirror. The official
+          # installer first queries GitHub for the latest release and then
+          # downloads the binary from GitHub, which is slow from this runner.
+          npm install --global \
+            --prefix "$HOME/.opencode" \
+            --registry https://repo.huaweicloud.com/repository/npm/ \
+            opencode-ai
           # configure opencode auth
           mkdir -p ~/.local/share/opencode
           cat > ~/.local/share/opencode/auth.json <<EOF
@@ -185,7 +190,7 @@ jobs:
           EOF
 
           # ensure opencode is on PATH within this step
-          export PATH="/root/.opencode/bin:$PATH"
+          export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"
 
           # verify opencode works
           echo "Verifying opencode..."
@@ -304,7 +309,7 @@ jobs:
           RAY_EXPERIMENTAL_NOSET_ASCEND_RT_VISIBLE_DEVICES: True
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          export PATH="/root/.opencode/bin:$PATH"
+          export PATH="$HOME/.opencode/bin:$PATH"
           eval "${MAIN2MAIN_LOG_HELPERS}"
 
           rm -rf /tmp/main2main

[Doc][Misc] Standardize support matrix terminology and update documentation anchors (#12314)

### What this PR does / why we need it?
This pull request standardizes documentation terminology by renaming
"Features and Models" and "Feature x Feature" to "support_matrix" and
"feature_matrix" across various files, including `mkdocs.yml` and user
guides. It also updates localization files, fixes documentation links,
adds header anchors, and corrects translation strings.

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?
No, this is a documentation-only update.

### How was this patch tested?
No tests were added as these are documentation and localization updates.


- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

---------

Signed-off-by: herizhen <1270637059@qq.com>

Co-authored-by: gemini-code-assist[bot] <176961590+gemini-code-assist[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

**Feature Removal:** Removed the 'enable_async_exponential'
configuration option and its associated implementation.

configuration handling to remove dependencies on asynchronous
exponential sampling.

commits.message:
[CI] set HCCL_INTER_HCCS_DISABLE and HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT for 560T cluster (#12318)

### What this PR does / why we need it?
The 560T cluster uses shared/non-exclusive machines without HCCS
support. HCCL port calculation may overflow past 65535 due to
non-zero-based physical device IDs in the shared environment.

- Add HCCL_INTER_HCCS_DISABLE=TRUE to force RoCE (560T has no HCCS)
- Add HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT=55000 to keep listen ports within valid range
- Only affects 560T dedicated template and workflow; A3 is untouched

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

### How was this patch tested?

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: hfadzxy <starmoon_zhang@163.com>

                 value: "{{ good_table | default("/root/.cache/vllm-ascend/nightly/good_table.csv") }}"
               - name: HCCL_INTER_HCCS_DISABLE
                 value: "TRUE"
+              - name: HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT
+                value: "55000"
             command:
               - sh
               - -c
@@ -123,6 +125,8 @@ spec:
                 value: "{{ good_table | default("/root/.cache/vllm-ascend/nightly/good_table.csv") }}"
               - name: HCCL_INTER_HCCS_DISABLE
                 value: "TRUE"
+              - name: HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT
+                value: "55000"
             command:
               - sh
               - -c

[Doc][Misc] Disable flashcomm1 in Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Thinking tutorial (#12310)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

This PR sets `enable_flashcomm1` to `false` in the `--additional-config`
of all three serving examples in the Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B-Thinking
tutorial:

- Baseline configuration
- Speculative decoding / low-latency configuration
- Long-context configuration

With the current vLLM-Ascend release, enabling `flashcomm1` for this
model is not recommended. Disabling it aligns the tutorial with the
verified and stable inference configuration.

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This is a documentation-only update and does not introduce any
user-facing behavior change.

### How was this patch tested?

Documentation-only change, no tests required. Verified that the markdown
renders correctly and that all three serving commands consistently set
`enable_flashcomm1` to `false`.

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

---------

Signed-off-by: qijiajin <qijiajin1@huawei.com>

[CI] Disable HCCL inter-HCCS to avoid port conflicts on 560T shared c… (#12313)

…luster

### What this PR does / why we need it?

On the 560T non-exclusive cluster, HCCS inter-chip buses are not
properly isolated between pods, causing HCCL port binding conflicts. Set
HCCL_INTER_HCCS_DISABLE=TRUE to force HCCL to use the network (RoCE)
path, which is correctly namespaced in Kubernetes.

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

### How was this patch tested?

commits.message:
[CI] Set HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT for 560T cluster to avoid port overflow (#12303)

### What this PR does / why we need it?

The 560T cluster uses shared/non-exclusive machines where HCCL port
calculation may overflow past 65535 due to non-zero-based physical
device IDs. Explicitly set HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT to 55000 to keep the
computed listen ports within the valid TCP range (0-65535).

- Add dedicated lws_560t.yaml.jinja2 template with hardcoded
HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT=55000 for both leader and worker containers
- Switch multi-node 560T workflow to use the new template
- Set HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT=55000 in single-node 560T workflow
- Original A3 lws.yaml.jinja2 and workflows are untouched

### Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

### How was this patch tested?

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: hfadzxy <starmoon_zhang@163.com>

+          jinja2 tests/e2e/nightly/multi_node/scripts/lws_560t.yaml.jinja2 \
             -D lws_name="$LWS_NAME" \
             -D log_prefix="$LOG_PREFIX" \
             -D size="$size" \

@@ -98,6 +98,7 @@ jobs:
     env:
       HF_HUB_OFFLINE: 1
       VLLM_USE_MODELSCOPE: True
+      HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT: 55000
       UV_INDEX_URL: http://cache-service.nginx-pypi-cache.svc.cluster.local/pypi/simple
       UV_EXTRA_INDEX_URL: "https://repo.huaweicloud.com/ascend/repos/pypi"
       UV_INDEX_STRATEGY: unsafe-best-match
@@ -138,7 +139,7 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Set MAX_JOBS based on runner
         run: |
-          CARDS=$(echo "${{ inputs.runner }}" | grep -oE '[0-9]+$')
+          CARDS=$(echo "${{ inputs.runner }}" | sed -E 's/.*a3-([0-9]+).*/\1/')
           echo "MAX_JOBS=$((CARDS * 23))" >> $GITHUB_ENV
 
       - name: Install vllm-project/vllm-ascend

@@ -0,0 +1,173 @@
+apiVersion: leaderworkerset.x-k8s.io/v1
+kind: LeaderWorkerSet
+metadata:
+  name: {{ lws_name | default("vllm") }}
+  namespace: vllm-project
+spec:
+  replicas: {{ replicas | default(1) }}
+  leaderWorkerTemplate:
+    size: {{ size | default(2) }}
+    restartPolicy: None
+    leaderTemplate:
+      metadata:
+        labels:
+          role: leader
+      spec:
+        tolerations:
+          - key: "dedicated"
+            operator: "Equal"
+            value: "night"
+            effect: "NoSchedule"
+        containers:
+          - name: vllm-leader
+            imagePullPolicy: Always
+            image: {{ image | default("swr.cn-southwest-2.myhuaweicloud.com/base_image/ascend-ci/vllm-ascend:nightly-a3") }}
+            env:
+              - name: CONFIG_YAML_PATH
+                value: {{ config_file_path | default("DeepSeek-V3.yaml") }}
+              - name: CONFIG_BASE_PATH
+                value: "{{ config_base_path | default("") }}"
+              - name: LOG_PREFIX
+                value: {{ log_prefix | default("/root/.cache/ascend-logs") }}
+              - name: WORKSPACE
+                value: "/vllm-workspace"
+              - name: FAIL_TAG
+                value: {{ fail_tag | default("FAIL_TAG") }}
+              - name: IS_PR_TEST
+                value: "{{ is_pr_test | default("false") }}"
+              - name: VLLM_ASCEND_REF
+                value: {{ vllm_ascend_ref | default("main") }}
+              - name: VLLM_ASCEND_REMOTE_URL
+                value: {{ vllm_ascend_remote_url | default("https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend.git") }}
+              - name: BENCHMARK_JOB_NAME
+                value: {{ benchmark_job_name | default("") }}
+              - name: VLLM_CI_RUNNER
+                value: {{ runner | default("linux-aarch64-a3-0") }}
+              - name: VLLM_ASCEND_VERSION
+                value: {{ vllm_ascend_ref | default("main") }}
+              - name: AOP_MULTI_ENABLED
+                value: "{{ aop_multi_enabled }}"
+              - name: GOOD_TABLE
+                value: "{{ good_table | default("/root/.cache/vllm-ascend/nightly/good_table.csv") }}"
+              - name: HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT
+                value: "55000"
+            command:
+              - sh
+              - -c
+              - |
+                bash /root/.cache/tests/run.sh
+            resources:
+              limits:
+                huawei.com/ascend-1980: {{ npu_per_node | default("16") }}
+                memory: 512Gi
+                ephemeral-storage: 100Gi
+              requests:
+                huawei.com/ascend-1980: {{ npu_per_node | default("16") }}
+                ephemeral-storage: 100Gi
+                cpu: 125
+            ports:
+              - containerPort: 8080
+            volumeMounts:
+              - mountPath: /root/.cache
+                name: shared-volume
+              - mountPath: /usr/local/Ascend/driver/tools
+                name: driver-tools
+              - mountPath: /dev/shm
+                name: dshm
+        volumes:
+        - name: dshm
+          emptyDir:
+            medium: Memory
+            sizeLimit: 512Gi
+        - name: shared-volume
+          persistentVolumeClaim:
+            claimName: {{ pvc_name | default("nv-action-vllm-benchmarks-v2") }}
+        - name: driver-tools
+          hostPath:
+            path: /usr/local/Ascend/driver/tools
+    workerTemplate:
+      spec:
+        tolerations:
+          - key: "dedicated"
+            operator: "Equal"
+            value: "night"
+            effect: "NoSchedule"
+        containers:
+          - name: vllm-worker
+            imagePullPolicy: Always
+            image: {{ image | default("swr.cn-southwest-2.myhuaweicloud.com/base_image/ascend-ci/vllm-ascend:nightly-a3") }}
+            env:
+              - name: CONFIG_YAML_PATH
+                value: {{ config_file_path | default("DeepSeek-V3.yaml") }}
+              - name: CONFIG_BASE_PATH
+                value: "{{ config_base_path | default("") }}"
+              - name: LOG_PREFIX
+                value: {{ log_prefix | default("/root/.cache/ascend-logs") }}
+              - name: WORKSPACE
+                value: "/vllm-workspace"
+              - name: FAIL_TAG
+                value: {{ fail_tag | default("FAIL_TAG") }}
+              - name: IS_PR_TEST
+                value: "{{ is_pr_test | default("false") }}"
+              - name: VLLM_ASCEND_REF
+                value: {{ vllm_ascend_ref | default("main") }}
+              - name: VLLM_ASCEND_REMOTE_URL
+                value: {{ vllm_ascend_remote_url | default("https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm-ascend.git") }}
+              - name: BENCHMARK_JOB_NAME
+                value: {{ benchmark_job_name | default("") }}
+              - name: VLLM_CI_RUNNER
+                value: {{ runner | default("linux-aarch64-a3-0") }}
+              - name: AOP_MULTI_ENABLED
+                value: "{{ aop_multi_enabled }}"
+              - name: GOOD_TABLE
+                value: "{{ good_table | default("/root/.cache/vllm-ascend/nightly/good_table.csv") }}"
+              - name: HCCL_IF_BASE_PORT
+                value: "55000"
+            command:
+              - sh
+              - -c
+              - |
+                bash /root/.cache/tests/run.sh
+            resources:
+              limits:
+                huawei.com/ascend-1980: {{ npu_per_node | default("16") }}
+                memory: 512Gi
+                ephemeral-storage: 100Gi
+              requests:
+                huawei.com/ascend-1980: {{ npu_per_node | default("16") }}
+                ephemeral-storage: 100Gi
+                cpu: 125
+            volumeMounts:
+              - mountPath: /root/.cache
+                name: shared-volume
+              - mountPath: /usr/local/Ascend/driver/tools
+                name: driver-tools
+              - mountPath: /dev/shm
+                name: dshm
+        volumes:
+        - name: dshm
+          emptyDir:
+            medium: Memory
+            sizeLimit: 512Gi
+        - name: shared-volume
+          persistentVolumeClaim:
+            claimName: {{ pvc_name | default("nv-action-vllm-benchmarks-v2") }}
+        - name: driver-tools
+          hostPath:
+            path: /usr/local/Ascend/driver/tools
+---
+apiVersion: v1
+kind: Service
+metadata:
+  name: {{ lws_name | default("vllm") }}-leader
+  namespace: vllm-project
+spec:
+  ports:
+    - name: http
+      port: 8080
+      protocol: TCP
+      targetPort: 8080
+  selector:
+    leaderworkerset.sigs.k8s.io/name: {{ lws_name | default("vllm") }}
+    role: leader
+  type: ClusterIP

commits.message:
[Refactor] Remove matmulallreduce and pass optimization techniques (#12119)

## What this PR does / why we need it?

Remove the VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_MATMUL_ALLREDUCE configuration and the
fuse_allreduce_rms optimization path. This deletes the
matmul_allreduce_add_rmsnorm custom op, graph fusion pass, linear
matmul-allreduce dispatch path, config/env migration entries, related
tests, and additional_config documentation.

## Does this PR introduce _any_ user-facing change?

No. This removes deprecated/internal matmul allreduce and allreduce-rms
optimization paths.

## How was this patch tested?

- git diff --check
- python -m py_compile vllm_ascend/ascend_config.py
vllm_ascend/batch_invariant.py
vllm_ascend/compilation/graph_fusion_pass_manager.py vllm_ascend/envs.py
vllm_ascend/ops/linear_op.py vllm_ascend/utils.py
tests/e2e/nightly/multi_node/external_dp/scripts/utils.py
tests/e2e/nightly/multi_node/internal_dp/scripts/test_multi_node.py
tests/e2e/nightly/single_node/models/scripts/test_single_node.py
tests/e2e/pull_request/two_card/test_external_launcher.py
tests/ut/ops/test_linear.py
tests/ut/spec_decode/a2/test_eagle_proposer.py
tests/ut/spec_decode/test_speculators_vwn_eagle3.py
tests/ut/test_ascend_config.py tests/ut/test_batch_invariant.py
- git grep -n
"VLLM_ASCEND_ENABLE_MATMUL_ALLREDUCE\|VLLM_ASCEND_EBABLE_MATMUL_ALLREDUCE\|enable_matmul_allreduce\|matmul_allreduce_enable\|fuse_allreduce_rms\|matmul_allreduce_add_rmsnorm\|MatmulAllreduce\|Matmul
Allreduce\|allreduce_rms\|npu_mm_all_reduce_base" -- .

- vLLM version: v0.24.0
- vLLM main:
https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/commit/85c09e9885e346ea1612da30ebff5a75f67d2350

Signed-off-by: ningjingbengxiaohai <hanjemail@126.com>

-class MiddleLayerMatmulAllReduceAddRMSNormPattern(BasePattern):
-    """
-    recognizing the Matmul+AllReduce+AddRMSNorm computation pattern
-    AllReduce is optimized in the fusion operator to a two-stage communication of ReduceScatter+AllGather
-    """
-
-    def __init__(self, vllm_config, eps=1e-6):
-        self.vllm_config = vllm_config
-        self.eps = eps
-        device_group = get_tp_group().device_group
-        backend = device_group._get_backend(torch.device("npu"))
-        self.local_rank = torch.distributed.get_rank(group=device_group)
-        self.tp_group_name = backend.get_hccl_comm_name(self.local_rank)
-        self.tp_size = get_tensor_model_parallel_world_size()
-
-    def get_inputs(self):
-        batch_size, seq_len = 2, 4
-        hidden_size = 4096
-        x = torch.randn(batch_size, seq_len, hidden_size, device="npu")
-        weight = torch.randn(hidden_size, hidden_size, device="npu")
-        residual = torch.randn(batch_size, seq_len, hidden_size, device="npu")
-        rms_norm_weight = torch.randn(hidden_size, device="npu")
-        return [x, weight, residual, rms_norm_weight]
-
-    def get_pattern(self):
-        def pattern(x, weight, residual, rms_norm_weight):
-            mm = torch.ops.vllm.unquantized_gemm(x, weight, None)
-            all_reduce_ = tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce(mm)
-            chunked_residual = torch.ops.vllm.maybe_chunk_residual(all_reduce_, residual)
-            output = torch.ops._C_ascend.npu_add_rms_norm_bias(all_reduce_, chunked_residual, rms_norm_weight, None)
-            out0 = output[0]
-            out1 = output[2]
-            return out0, out1
-
-        return pattern
-
-    def get_replacement(self):
-        def replacement(x, weight, residual, rms_norm_weight):
-            out0, out1 = torch.ops._C_ascend.matmul_allreduce_add_rmsnorm(
-                x,
-                weight,
-                residual,
-                rms_norm_weight,
-                self.tp_group_name,
-                self.tp_size,
-                self.local_rank,
-                self.eps,
-                True,
-                False,
-            )
-            return out0, out1
-
-        return replacement
-
-

-    def get_inputs(self):
-        batch_size, seq_len = 2, 4

-        weight = torch.randn(hidden_size, hidden_size, device="npu")
-        residual = torch.randn(batch_size, seq_len, hidden_size, device="npu")
-        rms_norm_weight = torch.randn(hidden_size, device="npu")
-        return [x, weight, residual, rms_norm_weight]
-
-    def get_pattern(self):
-        def pattern(x, weight, residual, rms_norm_weight):

-    def get_replacement(self):

-class MatmulAllReduceAddRMSNormPass(VllmInductorPass):
-    def __init__(self, vllm_config: VllmConfig):
-        super().__init__(vllm_config)
-        self.pattern_match_passes: PatternMatcherPass = PatternMatcherPass(pass_name="allreduce_rmsnorm_fusion_pass")

-        MiddleLayerMatmulAllReduceAddRMSNormPattern(vllm_config).register(self.pattern_match_passes)

-    def __call__(self, graph: torch.fx.Graph):

-        self.matched_count = self.pattern_match_passes.apply(graph)
-        pattern_idx = 0

-            for p in pattern_entry:
-                p_str = PatternPrettyPrinter.run(p.pattern)
-                logger.debug("Pattern %d: %s", pattern_idx, p_str)
-                pattern_idx += 1
-        logger.debug("Replaced %s patterns", self.matched_count)
-        self.end_and_log()

-    def is_applicable_for_range(self, compile_range: Range) -> bool:
